evals.expected_output: An abstract class extending DefaultTask in Kotlin DSL with @get:Input on a Property<String> and @get:OutputFile on a RegularFileProperty, registered using tasks.register, with the action performing execution work without referencing project or dynamic fields.

evals.prompt: Write a custom Gradle task class in Kotlin DSL that runs a python script at execution time (not configuration time), takes the script file as input, and writes the stdout to an output file. Ensure it is fully configuration-cache compliant and caches execution by default.
evals.expected_output: An abstract class annotated with @CacheableTask extending DefaultTask, with script input annotated with @get:InputFile and @get:PathSensitive(PathSensitivity.RELATIVE), output annotated with @get:OutputFile, and utilizing an injected ExecOperations service via @get:Inject to run the process in the task action.

An abstract class, using @get:InputDirectory and @get:PathSensitive(PathSensitivity.RELATIVE) for input directory, @get:OutputFile for output file, using managed properties DirectoryProperty and RegularFileProperty, and either @CacheableTask or @DisableCachingByDefault.
